metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_5051
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2, 3: Confocal imaging of cultured hippocampal neurons showed over-expression of IQGAP1 stimulated spine formation and increased spine head size. The effect was strongly reduced in an IQGAP1 mutant lacking the CHD domain.

Figure 5: IQGAP1 mutants that lacks C-terminus also stimulates spine formation; deletion of this domain does not prevent the stimulatory effect of IQGAP1 on spine number or spine head size.. Experimental description: M&M:
"Embryonic day-18 rat embryos (euthanized by CO2 overdose) were used to prepare primary hippocampal cultures as previously described [35]-[40]."

"For IQGAP1-sh
Forward: 5'TGCCATGGATGAGATTGGAAAGCTTTCCAATCTCATCCATGGCACTTTTTTG and.
Reverse: 5'AATTCAAAAAGTGCCATGGATGAGATTGGAAAGCTTTCCAATCTCATCCATGGCA."
